positive: A whimsical, vibrant celestial forest scene. Central focus is a group of glowing, ethereal bioluminescent flora and fauna, including stylized glowing mushrooms, cosmic fox silhouettes, and gently orbiting nebula wisps. The composition must be circular and symmetrical, emphasizing clean, high-contrast silhouettes against a deep indigo and gradient teal background. Use line-art elements mixed with soft gradients. Style: Highly detailed illustration, modern graphic novel aesthetic, inspired by Alphonse Mucha's flowing lines but with a cosmic, futuristic twist. Lighting: Internal glow emanating from the subjects, contrasting sharply with the dark background. Color Palette: Deep blues, vivid magentas, ethereal golds, and teal. Print-friendly details: Designed for seamless pattern repetition on fabric, keeping the central motifs scalable and readable.
negative: blur, low resolution, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, bad anatomy, ugly, disfigured, extra limbs, blurry, grayscale, monochrome
